channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Storms knock out power in the Midwest and disrupt Chicago flights
item.description: Damaging storms are sweeping through the Midwest, disrupting flights at Chicago airports and knocking out power to hundreds of thousands of customers.

item.title: Florida immigration arrests have quietly surged, with state and local agencies at the forefront
The man accused of killing a top Minnesota Democratic lawmaker and her husband is due to change plea
